title: Anne Weying
content:
{{Otheruses|She-Venom}} {{Characters |image = Anne Official Poster Textless.jpg |name = Anne Weying |real_name = Anne Weying |alias = {{Alias |codenames = [[Venom|She-Venom]] |derivatives = Annie
Ann}} |species = [[Humans|Human]] |gender = Female |affiliation = [[Micheline and McFarland]] (formerly) |symbiote = [[Venom]] (formerly) |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |status = Alive |movie = ''[[Venom (film)|Venom]]''
''[[Venom: Let There Be Carnage]]''
''[[Venom: The Last Dance]]'' (mentioned) |comic =''[[Venom (comic)|Venom]]'' |yule log video = ''[[Venom: Let There Be Carnage - Holiday Yule Log]]'' (picture) |portrayed_by = [[Michelle Williams]]}} {{Quote|Yeah, I can fight ugly.|Anne Weying|Venom (film)}} '''Anne Weying''' is a lawyer who was engaged to [[Eddie Brock]], only to lose her job from an incident with his interview with [[Carlton Drake]] at the Life Foundation. When Brock came back to her life after six months following their breakup, Weying had gained a relationship with [[Dan Lewis]], leading them to grow apart from each other. Once Brock became bonded with a [[Symbiotes|Symbiote]] named [[Venom]], Weying became involved with the side effects it had inflicted on him, leading to her finding out he was transforming into a monster and she had tried to separate Brock from Venom once it was revealed that the Symbiote was killing him on the inside. Weying had bonded with the Symbiote and became '''She-Venom''' to save Brock once he was kidnapped by the [[Life Foundation]]. She also had tried to stop the [[Battle at the Life Foundation Headquarters|fight]] between Brock and Drake. Once the Life Foundation was exposed for their crimes, Weying had decided to reconcile with Brock after their previous relationship went sour, agreeing to remain friends while she dated Lewis. When Lewis had proposed to her, Weying broke the news to Brock, who did not take it very well. Weying and Lewis then had helped Brock escape from [[Patrick Mulligan]]'s custody with the help of Venom, although Weying ended up being captured by [[Cletus Kasady]] and [[Frances Barrison]]. Weying was saved by Brock and Venom, who had killed Kasady before bidding Weying and Lewis their goodbyes to evade the police. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== Anne and her fiancée [[Eddie Brock]] moved to [[San Francisco]] after Eddie was fired from the [[Daily Globe]] due to an incident that happened at his job, resulting in him moving to Anne's home. In San Francisco, Eddie would go on to establish his career again. Anne was working as a lawyer for [[Micheline and McFarland]], a law firm that represented the [[Life Foundation]]. [[File:Anne breaks up with Eddie.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Anne breaks up with [[Eddie Brock|Eddie]]]] She arranged for her boyfriend, investigative reporter Eddie Brock, to interview the Life Foundation's CEO [[Carlton Drake]]. But Eddie broke into Anne's e-mails and had used information from confidential messages to confront Drake over his unethical business practices. The incident causes Anne to be fired from her job, and she ends her relationship; with Eddie, citing all the flaws that she had so far overlooked; because she had loved him.''[[Venom (film)|Venom]]'' ===Encounter with Venom=== ====Reencountering Eddie Brock==== {{Quote|You did this Eddie. Not [[Carlton Drake]], not the [[The Eddie Brock Report|network]]. You.|Anne Weying to [[Eddie Brock]]|Venom (film)}} [[File:Eddie and Anne meet on the street at night.jpg|thumb|250px|Eddie and Anne meet on the street]] Six months later, Anne was one day walking back to her home with her new boyfriend, [[Dan Lewis]], when she encountered [[Eddie Brock]] again. Once Dan left them to talk, Eddie explained to her what he was doing there and told her that he missed her; however, Weying left the conversation, ending on how it was too late to fix their relationship and she wanted him to move on. When Eddie became bonded with the [[Venom]] symbiote, he went to meet up with Anne at a restaurant where she was having dinner with Dan, he told her that he broke into the [[Life Foundation]] and may have been infected. After sending Eddie to the hospital, Anne called him and told him that he could have a parasite. ====Separating Venom and Eddie==== {{Quote|You're sick. Eddie, you're really sick.|Anne Weying to [[Eddie Brock]]|Venom (film)}} [[File:Anne watches venom kill.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Anne finds out about Venom]] Anne was later told by Dan that she needed to bring Eddie back to the hospital as his condition was worse than what he thought, she called Eddie, but he told her to stay away from him. Anne saw Eddie as [[Venom]] attacked a [[wikipedia:SWAT|S.W.A.T]] team and took him to the hospital to separate him from the symbiote, not knowing that a drone was spying on her while she was driving. [[File:Anne after separating Venom from Eddie.jpg|thumb|250px|Anne separates Venom from Eddie]] Confronted by Anne in her car, Eddie tried to explain what had happened to him and he apologized to her for everything he had done. Once in the hospital, Anne and Dan found that the "parasite" was slowly killing Eddie, which resulted in [[Venom]] attacking Dan but Anne used the ultrasound to force [[Venom]] off from Eddie. Eddie felt excruciating pain while hearing hyperactive sound, resulting in the symbiote being separated from Eddie. ====Bonded with Venom==== {{Quote|Hi, Eddie.|She-Venom to [[Eddie Brock]]|Venom (film)}} [[File:She-Venom_meets_Eddie.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Anne bonded with Venom]] After Eddie furiously tries to leave the hospital after this reveal, Anne and Dan talk about the situation while the Symbiote escapes through the ventilation and bonds itself with a dog. When Eddie gets captured by [[Roland Treece]] and his men, Anne finds the [[Venom]] symbiote and bonds with it to rescue Eddie. [[File:She-Venom_kisses_Eddie.jpg|thumb|250px|She-Venom kisses Eddie]] Anne as [[Venom]] goes to the woods where Eddie was going to be executed, while Treece prepared to execute Eddie, Anne stealthily grabbed and took down the two thugs behind him with her tentacles. Anne attacked Roland from behind and bit his head off, she then greeted Eddie, grabbed him, and kissed him while transferring the [[Venom]] Symbiote back to him. She was later left in the woods by Eddie and [[Venom]] as it was too dangerous for her. ====[[Battle at the Life Foundation Headquarters|Battle at the Life Foundation]]==== {{Quote|Told you I could fight ugly.|Anne Weying|Venom (film)}} [[File:Anne_talks_to_Eddie_after_stopping_Drake.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Anne talks to Eddie after stopping Drake]] Anne then goes to the [[Life Foundation]] while [[Venom]] faces [[Riot]], watching the fight in the cameras in the space shuttle launch facility. After Eddie and [[Venom]] fused with Drake and the [[Riot]] Symbiote, Anne assisted in the battle by using the symbiote's aversion to sound to disorientate [[Riot]] and separate it from his host with the loudspeakers of the space shuttle station. After the battle, Anne believed that the [[Venom]] Symbiote was dead, and rekindled her friendship with Eddie, unaware that [[Venom]] survived and the pair were fighting crime in the city. ===Case of Cletus Kasady=== ====Getting Engaged==== [[File:Anne Weying Happy.jpg|thumb|250px|Anne reveals her engagement]] {{Quote|Hey, Venom. Take care of him, all right? Don’t let him keep messing everything up.|Anne Weying to [[Venom]]|Venom: Let There Be Carnage}} About a year and a half after the battle at the [[Life Foundation]],[https://screenrant.com/venom-2-movie-timeline-setting-carnage-andy-serkis/ ''Venom 2'' Is Set About A Year & A Half After First Movie] Anne decided to get engaged to Dan and later contacted Eddie to tell him the news. She unknowingly called Eddie while he was out fighting crime with Venom, and mistakenly made the symbiote believe that she had broken up with Dr. Lewis. After the two met up at a restaurant, Anne showed Eddie her ring and informed him about the engagement, Eddie congratulated her, but Anne quickly noticed that something was bothering him, which led her to realize that Venom was alive and still lived with Eddie. Anne asks Eddie if Venom is alive, but he lied, which leads to a heated argument as Eddie was not okay with Anne getting married as he still had feelings for her. Anne then told Venom to keep Eddie safe before saying goodbye to the two.''[[Venom: Let There Be Carnage]]'' ====Rescuing Eddie Brock==== {{Quote|Oh, God, I’m never doing that again. God, well, maybe never. I don’t know. Honestly, it’s really fun.|Anne Weying|Venom: Let There Be Carnage}} [[File:She Venom at police station.jpg|thumb|left|250px|She-Venom arrives to rescue Eddie]] Following the escape of a serial killer named [[Cletus Kasady]], Eddie Brock was arrested due to his connection with him. Eddie used his one phone call to contact Anne and request her help. Anne arrived at the police station and discovered that not only had Eddie separated from Venom, but that Kasady had a [[Carnage|symbiote]] of his own. After being asked by Eddie to find Venom, she and Dan went to [[Mrs. Chen's Store]], where they found Venom bonded to [[Mrs. Chen]]. Anne then managed to convince Venom to return to Eddie by appealing to his ego. Anne bonded with Venom again and the two broke Eddie out of the police station. As Venom still refused to leave Anne and rebond with Eddie, Anne tells Eddie that he needs to apologize to Venom, after a few failed attempts, Venom finally accepts his apology and rebonds with Eddie. Anne and Dan then decided to leave town while Eddie and Venom dealt with Cletus and Carnage. ====[[Duel at Grace Cathedral]]==== {{Quote|I just incapacitated your boyfriend. Now, he’ll be okay… with an answer about where Eddie Brock is."
"Well, I’m sure as shit not gonna tell you that.|[[Shriek]] and Anne Weying|Venom: Let There Be Carnage}} While packing stuff from their house to leave, Anne was kidnapped by [[Shriek]], Kasady's lover, as a hostage to make sure that Eddie goes to their Red Wedding. Anne was taken to [[wikipedia:Grace Cathedral, San Francisco|Grace Cathedral]], where Eddie and Venom soon arrived asking where she was. As the two symbiotes and their hosts fought across the cathedral, Carnage grabbed Anne to kill her as punishment for Brock. After Eddie and Venom recovered, the two climbed to the top of the cathedral and successfully landed Anne to safety while killing Shriek. [[File:Anne and Dan say goodbye to Eddie.png|thumb|250px|Anne and Dan say goodbye to Eddie and Venom]] As Eddie started falling off the top of the cathedral after being temporarily separated from Venom, the symbiote briefly bonded to Dan and Anne's bodies to save Brock from the fall at the last minute. After Venom killed both Carnage and Kasady, the authorities started to search for Eddie and Venom due to their involvement in Carnage's rampage, the two decided to go on the run and become fugitives after bidding their farewells to Anne and Dan. ==Personality== Anne Weying is very patient; but is also a very focused woman, she was in a relationship; with [[Eddie Brock]] and she had loved him very much but Anne knew when to break up with him once she had realized that he had not grown up yet and did not take their relationship seriously. Anne likes to take a stand on her personal life over her other desires, she is a professional woman, she is ambitious, sharp and not willing to settle. Despite this, Anne is willing to help the people who were once close to her despite the strange circumstances, as seen when she was helping Eddie get rid of the "[[Venom|parasite]]" and later she even had bonded with Venom if that meant having a way to rescue Eddie. After defeating [[Carlton Drake]], Anne made amends and forgave Eddie even admitting that it felt great both times she had bonded with Venom. ==Powers and Abilities== ===Former Powers=== [[File:She-Venom rescues Eddie Brock.jpg|thumb|250px|She-Venom carrying [[Eddie Brock]]]] *'''Symbiotic Enhancement/Symbiotic Black Suit''': Anne shares some similar superhuman attributes with Eddie as a result of his association with the [[Venom]] [[Symbiotes|Symbiote]], which covers her body in a black biomass while also increasing Anne's abilities. Despite looking slimmer compared to Eddie, she still is able to do almost everything Eddie can while bonded with the Symbiote. **'''Superhuman Strength''': Being temporarily bonded with Venom, Anne can effortlessly pick up and throw adult humans with considerable distances when she is under her symbiotic transformation. She was able to easily bite [[Roland Treece]]'s head off with one bite and break through the walls of a police station while carrying Eddie Brock. **'''Tentacle Extension''': While bonded with Venom, Anne uses the Symbiote substance at will, forming them into tendril and tentacle-like appendages allowing her to knock down enemies by grappling toward them. **'''Superhuman Durability''': With Venom, Anne can withstand numerous impacts, as seen when she jumped through a solid wall of the police station while rescuing Eddie, showing no signs of damage. **'''Superhuman Speed''': With Venom, Anne can move faster than the average human. **'''Superhuman Agility''': With Venom, Anne has levels of agility far greater than regular humans, being able to leap from various roofs without difficulty while carrying Eddie. **'''Fangs''': Venom also gives Anne a series of sharp teeth, which are capable of shredding and tearing flesh and bones with ease. ===Abilities=== *'''Expert Lawyer''': Anne is an amazing lawyer, being regarded as one of the best by the likes of Carlton Drake himself. ==Facilities== *'''[[Anne Weying's House]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *Mother ===Allies=== *[[Mr. Belvedere]] - Pet *[[Eddie Brock]] - Ex-Fiancé, Close Friend and Savior *[[Venom]] - Former Symbiote, Close Friend and Savior *[[Dan Lewis]] - Fiancé *[[Mrs. Chen]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Life Foundation]] **[[Carlton Drake]]/[[Riot]] † - Former Boss **[[Roland Treece]] † - Victim *[[Patrick Mulligan]] † - Situational Enemy *[[Cletus Kasady]]/[[Carnage]] † - Attempted Killer *[[Shriek|Frances Barrision/Shriek]] † - Attempted Killer {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Anne Weying is the ex-wife of [[Eddie Brock]] and the mother of their son [[w:c:marvel:Dylan Brock (Earth-616)|Dylan Brock]]. She bonded with the [[Venom]] [[Symbiotes|symbiote]] becoming She-Venom. This causes her to commit suicide. *While Anne doesn't use the She-Venom alias on screen, her symbiote-augmented form is called "She-Venom" in a special feature reveal video released by Sony.[https://youtu.be/NO-l2lwuPbA ''VENOM'' Clip - "She Venom" Special Features Reveal] ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Sara Holden]] and [[Nikita Mitchell]] were stunt doubles for [[Michelle Williams]] in the role of Anne Weying. ==Appearances== {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" width="100%" ! Appearances for Anne Weying |- | In chronological order: * ''[[Venom (comic)|Venom]]'' * ''[[Venom (film)|Venom]]'' * ''[[Venom: Let There Be Carnage]]'' |} ==References== {{Gallery|Anne Weying/Gallery}} {{Wq|Anne Weying}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Venom (film) Characters]] [[Category:Venom: Let There Be Carnage Characters]] [[Category:Venom (comic) Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Micheline and McFarland Employees]] [[Category:Symbiote Hosts]] [[Category:Heroes]] [[es:Anne Weying]]
